description: B2B SaaS team productivity platform (Linear + Notion hybrid)

tickets.title: Implement webhook retry logic with exponential backoff
tickets.description: Backend feature: add retry handler for webhook delivery failures, with exponential backoff and max 5 retries

tickets.title: Migrate auth from JWT to session cookies
tickets.description: Cross-cutting change: replace JWT tokens with secure session cookies. Touches frontend middleware, backend auth service, and integration tests.

tickets.title: Dashboard performance: lazy-load heavy chart components
tickets.description: Frontend optimization: implement lazy loading for the dashboard's chart modules using React.lazy() and dynamic imports to reduce initial bundle size

tickets.title: Add CSV export to the reports module
tickets.description: Frontend feature: add a download-as-CSV button to the reports view, integrating with the reports API and handling large datasets

tickets.title: Fix broken pagination on the users list page
tickets.description: Bug: pagination controls don't update the URL query params correctly; prev/next buttons sometimes skip pages

tickets.title: Slack notification integration for webhook events
tickets.description: Feature: when webhook delivery fails repeatedly, post a notification to a designated Slack channel
tickets.decoy_reason: Webhook terminology overlaps with PROJ-201; classifier must discriminate based on code/test artifacts

tickets.title: Real-time collaboration on dashboard tiles
tickets.description: Feature: add WebSocket-based real-time updates when multiple users edit dashboard tile configs simultaneously (CRDT conflict resolution)
tickets.decoy_reason: Dashboard terminology overlaps with PROJ-225; classifier must read actual code/package.json changes to distinguish
